stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Differences training requires the acquisition of additional knowledge.Familiarisation training requires the acquisition of additional knowledge and training on an appropriate training device or the aircraft.
options.b: Differences training requires the acquisition of additional training on an appropriate training device or the aircraft.Familiarisation training requires the acquisition of additional knowledge.
options.c: Differences training and familiarisation training are both the same.
options.d: Differences training requires the acquisition of additional knowledge and training on an appropriate training device or the aircraft.Familiarisation training requires the acquisition of additional knowledge.
